holdings.infoBox: SPYG is an equity ETF with a total of 147 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.27%, Microsoft at 8.07%, Apple at 6.23%, Alphabet at 6.12%, and Broadcom at 5.34%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 Growth ETF (SPYG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of primarily large-cap growth stocks. The index selects companies from the S&P 500 Index based on three growth factors. SPYG was launched on Sep 25, 2000 and is issued by State Street.
